headline: Episode 21
summary: Headlines include Elizabeth Holmes, US politics & policy, Inditex and Glencore
body_text:
This edition features these stories from ft.com

Holmes accuses former business partner of abuse in Theranos trial

Biden faces legislative logjam in run-up to Christmas

Zara owner Inditex completes ‘generational’ management overhaul

Activist calls on Glencore to spin off coal assets
